subcodes.first_line: O Divine Herald! Two letters bearing your seal arrived and their contents were noted. Praise be to God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی ربانی دو طغری نامه شما رسید و بر مضمون اطلاع حاصل گردید الحمد لله
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement
